Created attachment 173912
Proposed patch (since 415742 revision)

(In reply to comment #67)
> If you have the chance do sort USES value.
(In reply to comment #67)
> <transitive verb> + <adjective>. Where's a noun? Maybe use "Audio support"
> or "Audio backends" instead.
Ok, proposed. Not sure about compiler:c++11-lib, currently:
% make extract && find work/* -type f | xargs grep -l -e "c++11" | wc -l
       0

(In reply to comment #68)
> I didn't check your attachment #173905
I checked attachment #173905. Among others, you proposed other method to do changes for devel/godot-tools port, where approved method is to do changes in devel/godot port instead, which may reduce possible changes for devel/godot-tools port.
